title: chaenorhinum langei
intro: Chaenorhinum langei, also known as Lange's Chaenorhinum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Chaenorhinum langei is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat a range of health conditions.
